response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Vitest) and additional relevant technologies (Kotlin/Java, MongoDB, AWS, Docker). His recent roles at re:cinq and Optilyz highlight direct experience with AI agent infrastructure, scalable backend services, and user-centric frontend development. Contributions to open-source projects and technical workshops further validate his expertise in architecture, testing, and collaboration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements
Proven track record in AI agent infrastructure and scalable backend services (e.g., re:cinq, Optilyz)
Strong contributions to open-source projects and technical workshops, demonstrating deep engineering skills and knowledge sharing
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, a primary stack requirement for this role
Primary stack experience leans heavily toward TypeScript/Node.js, with less recent exposure to Kotlin/Java (secondary stack)
Some early-career roles (e.g., freelance, MGSoftware) are dated and may not reflect current best practices

key_factors.factor: AI agent and scalable backend infrastructure experience
